extra.reason: Replaced git_revwalk with git_odb_foreach in hanami_push_to_blossom to enumerate all object types (commits, trees, blobs, tags). Extracted callback to file-scope static function for C11 compliance.
Fixed by deferring cap update until after successful realloc. Now cap only changes when the allocation succeeds.
Removed contradictory CURLOPT_UPLOAD and CURLOPT_INFILESIZE_LARGE. Now uses only CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST=PUT + CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS.

Fixed 4 memory leaks: (1) ODB backend freed when git_repository_odb fails. (2) RefDB backend freed when git_refdb attach fails. (3) nostr_ctx freed when refdb creation fails. (4) Error* freed in ensure_relays on relay connection failure. (5) event->id freed before overwrite in sign_event.

Fixed: (1) Detached HEAD now published as raw OID hex. (2) malloc failures in publish_state now skip the ref (continue) instead of sending NULL target. Remaining: cache refresh and network error silencing tracked separately.
